certification_basis: The AiGOL CLI exposes dashboard, dashboard summary, dashboard approvals, dashboard bridges, dashboard chains, dashboard learning, and dashboard execution commands.
The dashboard summarizes latest chains, pending approvals, pending bridge authorizations, recent execution requests, recent learning artifacts, and suggested safe next actions.
The dashboard reuses certified approval and bridge command groups.
Replay wrapper hashes and relevant artifact hashes are validated before display.
The dashboard does not dispatch, invoke, execute, mutate governance, mutate replay, create execution requests, or infer authorization.
known_limitations: The dashboard suggests safe next actions but does not execute them inside the interactive conversation loop.
Older replay artifacts without canonical_chain_id remain visible only through available compatibility evidence.
